news.title: Why India built crude reserves but not LPG buffers despite demand surge
news.india_relevance: Directly addresses India's energy security strategy and the critical vulnerability in its cooking gas supply chain.
news.why_it_matters:
Explains the structural mismatch between India's strategic petroleum reserves and its growing reliance on imported LPG.
Highlights the logistical and policy hurdles in creating a buffer for a fuel used by millions of households.

news.title: Mint Explainer: Why a rare exit penalty adds weight to upGrad’s Unacademy bid
news.india_relevance: Analyzes a high-stakes consolidation move in India's massive edtech sector involving two major players.
news.why_it_matters:
Breaks down the legal and financial mechanics of M&A in the startup ecosystem.
Illustrates how deal structures are evolving to prevent poaching and ensure commitment in a volatile market.

news.title: SIP in mutual funds causing losses? Here’s how tax-loss harvesting can turn today’s dip into tomorrow’s gains | EXPLAINED
news.india_relevance: Provides actionable financial literacy for India's rapidly growing retail investor base using SIPs.
news.why_it_matters:
Explains the mechanism of tax-loss harvesting within the Indian income tax framework.
Helps investors understand how to optimize portfolios during market corrections.

news.title: India’s Widening Jobs-Gap for Young Graduates
news.india_relevance: Focuses on the most pressing socio-economic challenge for India's demographic dividend.
news.why_it_matters:
Highlights the structural disconnect between educational output and high-quality job creation.
Points to potential long-term risks for consumption and social stability if the gap persists.

news.title: India’s services sector expected to reach $6 trillion by 2035, Agriculture’s share in GDP to halve to 10%: Report - The Financial Express
news.india_relevance: Outlines the long-term structural transformation of the Indian economy over the next decade.

news.title: Goldman Sachs cuts India's growth forecast to 6.4% for FY27, sees Re sliding to 95; Santanu Sengupta on the full outlook

news.why_it_matters:

news.title: Cabinet clears ₹33,660 cr BHAVYA scheme to set up 100 industrial parks

news.why_it_matters:
Aims to provide 'plug-and-play' infrastructure to attract global supply chains shifting from China.
Represents a significant fiscal commitment to the 'Make in India' initiative.

news.title: Solar manufacturers got no funds under ₹24,000-cr PLI scheme till Feb end, Parl told
